abilities.name: Frenzied Charge
abilities.text: This model may Charge while engaged and ignore the once per activation restriction on Charge.

abilities.name: Grip of the Guild
abilities.text: Enemy models leaving engagement with this model with a Walk action reduce their movement by an additional 2".

abilities.name: Threatening Demeanor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

actions.name: Butcher's Cleaver
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is a non-unique model, this action receives a (r).

triggers.name: Cleaning Up the Streets
triggers.text: An ally within 8" gains a Bolstered token.

triggers.name: Sweeping Strike
triggers.text: A different model within 1" of the target is dealt the same damage -1.

triggers.name: Dismember
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Down the Wrong Path
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target up to its Sp.

triggers.name: Draw Them In
triggers.text: Enemy models within (t)4" of the target must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be moved up to 4" toward the target.

actions.name: Second Slice
actions.effects: Enemy models within range are dealt 1 damage. Then, enemy models with (warding) abilities within range are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Cleaning Up the Streets
triggers.text: An ally within 8" gains a Bolstered token.

triggers.name: Break Protocol
triggers.text: This model may declare a non-Charge general action.
